languages.text: "...пока непросвещенные дикари не нарушили целостность экспозиции".
"...until unenlightened savages violated the integrity of the exhibit."
languages.original_text: "...пока непросвещенные дикари не нарушили целостность экспозиции".

traits.locale_text: "...until all-pervading, unenlightened savages violated the integrity of the exhibit."
"...until all-pervading, unenlightened savages violated the integrity of the exhibit."
"...until all-pervading, unenlightened savages violated the integrity of the exhibit."

languages.text: «... hasta que unos brutos primitivos violaron la integridad de la exposición».
languages.original_text: "...until unenlightened savages violated the integrity of the exhibit."

traits.locale_text: «... hasta que unos brutos primitivos violaron la integridad de la exposición».

languages.text: “……直到那些愚昧无知的野蛮人损毁了这件展品的完整性。”
languages.original_text: "...until unenlightened savages violated the integrity of the exhibit."

traits.locale_text: “……直到那些愚昧无知的野蛮人损毁了这件展品的完整性。”

languages.text: « Jusqu'à ce que des sauvages incultes violent l'intégrité de cette pièce de ma collection. »
languages.original_text: "...until unenlightened savages violated the integrity of the exhibit."

traits.locale_text: « Jusqu'à ce que des sauvages incultes violent l'intégrité de cette pièce de ma collection. »

languages.text: "Ta ki cahil vahşiler, serginin bütünlüğünü ihlal edene değin."
languages.original_text: "...until unenlightened savages violated the integrity of the exhibit."

traits.locale_text: "Ta ki cahil vahşiler, serginin bütünlüğünü ihlal edene değin."

languages.text: "... bis unerleuchtete Barbaren die Integrität der Ausstellung verletzten."
languages.original_text: "...until unenlightened savages violated the integrity of the exhibit."

traits.locale_text: "... bis unerleuchtete Barbaren die Integrität der Ausstellung verletzten."

languages.text: 「…未開の野蛮人が展示の完全性を侵害するまで」
languages.original_text: "...until unenlightened savages violated the integrity of the exhibit."

traits.locale_text: 「…未開の野蛮人が展示の完全性を侵害するまで」
